title: Get PR #145 checks passing
description: PR #145 currently has failing CI checks. Reproduce each failing check locally, implement minimal fixes, and verify all checks pass to unblock merge.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Started triage for PR #145. Next steps: checkout PR branch, inspect failing GitHub checks, reproduce locally, patch, and rerun affected checks.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Progress update:
- Pulled PR #145 and inspected failing GitHub job logs.
- Reproduced Dashboard Unit Tests failures locally.
- Fixed TypeScript errors in EvaluationTask.tsx, DataSourceSelector.tsx, and DataSourceVersionSelector.tsx.
- Updated mismatched score-result unit test expectation to align with current UI copy (Triage confidence: ...).
- Verified locally: dashboard ci:typecheck and ci:unit both pass.
